title: M.Tech Electronics Engineering (VLSI Design and Technology)
content: The Department of Electronics & Communication Engineering offers its advanced M.Tech program in VLSI Design and Technology, designed for students seeking specialized expertise in Very-Large-Scale Integration (VLSI) systems. This rigorous two-year postgraduate program delves into advanced subjects such as digital and analog circuit design, semiconductor device physics, microelectronics, system-on-chip (SoC) design, and FPGA-based system development. Students will gain practical experience through state-of-the-art laboratories equipped with the latest industry-standard tools and technologies. Graduates of the M.Tech program will be equipped for high-level careers in sectors such as semiconductor design and manufacturing, consumer electronics, and telecommunications, with roles including VLSI Design Engineer, Verification Engineer, FPGA Developer, ASIC Design Engineer, and Research Scientist. The program is led by a distinguished faculty with extensive research and industry backgrounds, ensuring that students receive top-notch education and mentorship. Through innovative project work, students will hone their technical skills while fostering creativity and critical thinking. This program not only aims to provide deep technical knowledge but also to develop leadership and research capabilities, preparing graduates to excel and lead in the rapidly advancing field of VLSI technology B.E/B.Tech in relevant discipline with minimum 50% marks or equivalent Students with a CUET / GATE score will be given preference in the merit list. 01 To independently carry out research /investigation and development work to solve practical problems. 02 To write and present a substantial technical report/document. 03 To demonstrate a degree of mastery over the area as per the specialization of the program. The mastery should be at a level higher than the requirements in the appropriate bachelor program. 04 To function effectively as an individual or as a member or leader in a team. 05 To keep abreast with state of art technologies through lifelong learning. 01 Apply concepts of mathematics in Communication especially Satellite Communication Signal processing and Electromagnetic domain. 02 Solve issues in real world of Satellite communication sectors, and develop feasible and viable in terms of communication systems. 03 Inculcate effective communication skills, team work, and professional ethics and pursue career in research. 01 Analyze, estimate solve complex problems and meet the challenges in the Satellite communication domain.
